hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl+ font-black tracking-tighter leading-none text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-white via-white to-white/60
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-tight text-white

grids.bento_marketing: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 md:gap-8
grids.asset_gallery: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6
grids.dashboard_control_room: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

cards.base: bg-[#ffffff0d] backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-6 transition-all duration-300
cards.glow_effect: relative before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-gradient-to-b before:from-[#00E5FF]/20 before:to-transparent before:opacity-0 hover:before:opacity-100 before:transition-opacity before:duration-500 before:rounded-2xl before:-z-10

buttons.primary: relative inline-flex items-center justify-center bg-[#00E5FF]/10 text-[#00E5FF] border border-[#00E5FF]/50 rounded-full px-8 py-3.5 text-sm font-semibold tracking-wide hover:bg-[#00E5FF] hover:text-[#050510] hover:shadow-[0_0_24px_rgba(0,229,255,0.6)] transition-all duration-300 overflow-hidden
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center bg-white/5 text-white border border-white/10 rounded-full px-8 py-3.5 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-white/30 transition-all duration-300
buttons.accent: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#009DFF] to-[#7C3AED] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3.5 text-sm font-semibold hover:shadow-[0_0_24px_rgba(124,58,237,0.5)] transition-all duration-300

inputs.base: bg-[#101827] border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-5 py-4 text-white placeholder-[#B8C2CC]/50 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#00E5FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00E5FF] transition-all

pills_categories.base: px-4 py-2 rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/5 text-sm text-[#B8C2CC] hover:text-white hover:border-[#009DFF]/50 hover:bg-[#009DFF]/10 transition-colors whitespace-nowrap
pills_categories.active: px-4 py-2 rounded-full border border-[#00E5FF] bg-[#00E5FF]/20 text-[#00E5FF] whitespace-nowrap

micro_interactions_and_animations.custom_cursor: Framer motion fixed layout. A 6px cyan dot (#00E5FF) and a 32px glowing ring (border border-[#00E5FF]/50) that trails slightly behind the dot.
micro_interactions_and_animations.mouse_parallax: Hero images, background orbs, and text layers should use Framer Motion `useScroll` or mouse position tracking to shift slightly (-10px to 10px) in opposition to cursor movement.
micro_interactions_and_animations.particles: Use `react-tsparticles`. Setup: slow-moving, tiny white and cyan dots, opacity 0.2 to 0.4, connecting lines disabled, floating upwards.
micro_interactions_and_animations.page_loading: A full-screen dark #050510 overlay with an animated glowing LazR Hub logo in the center. Fades out smoothly on mount.
micro_interactions_and_animations.scroll_reveal: Staggered fade-up (opacity 0 to 1, y: 20 to 0) for asset grids using Framer Motion `<motion.div>`.

media_and_assets.icons: Use `lucide-react` (installed by default). Stick to a `strokeWidth={1.5}` for a delicate, sharp tech look.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly apply the specified color palette (#050510 for main background, #101827 for surface/elevated areas). Do not use pure black (#000000).

Install the required fonts via Google Fonts in index.html: `<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Unbounded:wght@400;600;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">`
Update tailwind.config.js to include font families: `headings: ['Unbounded', 'sans-serif']` and `body: ['Outfit', 'sans-serif']`.
Ensure glassmorphism is achieved using `bg-[#ffffff0d] backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10` and avoid fully transparent backgrounds without blur.
Implement a custom loading screen that displays a glowing animated logo on load before revealing the site.
For the animated gradient accents (cyan/purple), use CSS gradients with Framer Motion or pure CSS keyframes.
Ensure `data-testid` attributes are added to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, clickable cards).
Use standard semantic HTML elements combined with Tailwind classes. Implement the UI using `.js` or `.jsx` components, not `.tsx`.
